name: Lemon Velvet
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the graham cracker crumbs and melted margarine in a bowl.
2. Press the mixture into the bottom of a 13 x 9 x 2-inch pan.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine the softened cream cheese, sugar, milk, and lemon rind. Mix until smooth.
4. Fold in the chopped walnuts and whipped heavy cream.
5. Spread the mixture over the crust.
6. Freeze the dessert for at least 2 hours before cutting into squares.
7. Garnish with lemon slices and additional graham cracker crumbs.
Serves: 17 to 20
Source: "Mountain Measures" -- Junior League of Charleston, WV ed. 1974
